archimate:Representation.name: geoJSON
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: GeoJSON is a format for encoding geospatial data in JSON (JavaScript Object Notation). It provides a standard and flexible way to represent geographic features, such as points, lines, and polygons, along with their associated attributes.
Publisher: Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF)
Source: https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7946
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/GeoJSONRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/GeoJSONRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: GeoJSON is a format for encoding geospatial data in JSON (JavaScript Object Notation). It provides a standard and flexible way to represent geographic features, such as points, lines, and polygons, along with their associated attributes.
